name: Sensitive File Permissions Allow Public Access
notes:
This rule triggers when the permissions for a sensitive file are publicly accessible.  The Files in Sensitive Directories reference set is populated by the Files in Sensitive File Directories rule. 

Note: The Sensitive Directories reference set must be populated.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Link Shared Events') AND ("Public Permission" IS NOT NULL OR qid=='101250974')
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365, Amazon AWS CloudTrail
when an event matches any of the following BB:Exfiltration: Files in Sensitive Directories
when the event matches (RULENAME(creeventlist) = 'BB:CategoryDefinition: Link Shared Events') AND ("Public Permission" IS NOT NULL OR qid=='101250974') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Sensitive File Permissions Allow Public Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365, Amazon AWS CloudTrail
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:Exfiltration: Files in Sensitive Directories
AND when the event matches (RULENAME(creeventlist) = 'BB:CategoryDefinition: Link Shared Events') AND ("Public Permission" IS NOT NULL OR qid=='101250974') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Sensitive File Permissions Changed to Allow Public Access
Event description: Detected sensitive file permissions  that allow public access
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
